recentNews.headline: Forgepoint operating as a16z Speedrun-backed seed startup selling AI quoting agents to US manufacturers, SOC 2 Type II certified
recentNews.whyItMatters: The only verifiable signals are the a16z Speedrun imprimatur, an enterprise-grade SOC 2 Type II badge, and a sub-30-day deployment claim, which together suggest the company is past pure stealth and selling into real manufacturing accounts, but with no priced round disclosed there is no public valuation anchor.

note: Essentially no Tier 1/2 press coverage exists for this specific company (forgepoint.ai, the AI manufacturing back-office startup). No WSJ/Bloomberg/FT/Reuters/Axios/TechCrunch/The Information/CNBC/Fortune/Crunchbase News article announcing a funding round, launch, or hire could be verified. Searches surfaced only the unrelated 'Forgepoint Capital' cybersecurity VC, an unrelated procurement startup named 'Forge', and non-trusted directory pages. Backers a16z Speedrun and Company Ventures appear only in directory listings, not a citable announcement, so no funding round is reported as a dated news event to avoid fabrication.
